sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109412" key="u(potri/taios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποτρίταιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl>/<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl> <sense id="n109412.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">less than full,</tr_> of the moon, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antioch.Astr.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.115</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
